reviews.comment:
Exelentisima estacion de servicio y atencion!!...muy pero muy completa y el lugar hermoso, digno de hacer un alto en el camino para continuar mas relajado!!

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service station and service!!...very complete and the place is beautiful, worth stopping for to continue more relaxed!!

reviews.comment:
Caro..poca variedad..
Desde que se convirtieron a ypf full ya no tienen la comida de antes que era mas aceptable y no tan cara

(Translated by Google)
Expensive...little variety... Since they became a YPF Full station, they no longer have the food they used to have, which was more acceptable and not so expensive.
